CONTENT.Club career: Ahead of the 2019–20 season, Mamba joined Bundesliga club SC Paderborn 07 on a three-year contract. In September 2020, a move to 1. FC Köln failed due to a muscle injury detected during Mamba's medical examination. Both clubs had already agreed a transfer fee following protracted negotiations.On 19 January 2021, Mamba signed with Kazakhstan Premier League club Kairat until 31 December 2022. On 14 June 2021, after scoring 2 goals in 13 appearances in all competitions for Kairat, Mamba joined Hansa Rostock on a year-long loan deal with the option to make the move permanent. On 11 July 2022, Kairat announced that Mamba had left the club after his contract was terminated by mutual agreement.On 21 August 2022, Mamba joined Chinese Super League club Dalian Pro.In January 2024, Mamba signed with TFF First League club Tuzlaspor.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in Germany, Mamba is of Congolese Malagasy descent.
CONTENT.External links: Streli Mamba at SoccerwayProfile at kicker.de

SUMMARY: Streli Mamba (born 17 June 1994) is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward for TFF First League club Tuzlaspor.
